rulings.Case Title: LARRY TANKS VS. HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Revive Abated Action And Set The Matter For Trial
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 25, 2019 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion to revive abated action and set the matter for trial is granted. The Sacramento Superior Court in case #34-2018-00231210 appointed Linda Abraham-Tanks as special administrator with "power to maintain the action and execute any related settlement agreements in San Francisco Superior Court, Case No. CGC 15-276435, on January 17, 2019. Probate Code section 58(a) defines "personal representative" as meaning, in part, "special administrator." The Sacramento Court order complies with the personal representative requirement under 45 U.S.C. section 59. Hearing required as to the trial date. The hearing will be at 9:30 a.m. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30 p.m. stating their intention to contest. If a tentative ruling is contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing. If a tentative ruling is not contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must either bring the proposed order to the hearing or submit it after the hearing in compliance with CRC 3.1312. = (503/CML)
